description_long: This object consists of three weathered metal barrels, each showing significant signs of rust, chipping paint, and surface abrasions. The barrels are cylindrical with reinforced horizontal ridges and are colored red, green, and brownish-black, with the red and green barrels standing upright and the brownish-black one lying on its side. The green barrel features a white flammable warning symbol, while the others are unmarked. The surfaces are heavily worn, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure and industrial use. The barrels appear hollow and are likely used for storing or transporting liquids or chemicals. Their battered appearance and utilitarian design make them typical fixtures in urban, industrial, or construction environments.
description: Three heavily weathered metal barrels—red, green, and rusted brown—stand and lie together, showing chipped paint, rust, and industrial wear.
description_view_0: Two upright barrels (red and green) and one rusted barrel lying horizontally, with the green barrel's flammable symbol visible.
description_view_1: Rear view of the upright red and green barrels, with the rusted barrel partially obscured behind them.
description_view_2: Green barrel is most prominent, with the red barrel behind and the rusted barrel's end visible to the right.
description_view_3: Rusted barrel in the foreground lying down, with the upright green and red barrels behind it.
